response.overview: This series tells the story of the production crew and participants of a reality competition that was once famous but is now increasingly losing viewership. Under pressure, publisher TJ, played by Emma Maembong, wants to redeem her dignity and her publication's plans at all costs. This series also reveals the motives behind each participant's entry, all vying for a prize money of USD 1 million. Among them is Ali, played by Ben Amir, who wants to break free from the grip of his old gang in order to marry the woman of his choice, who is the daughter of a police officer. Meanwhile, Zana, portrayed by Amelia Henderson, wants to liberate herself from being bound by her past as a sex worker, determined to win the cash prize. Joe, played by Lah Ahmad, needs to settle his debts to save the lives of his wife and child.
response.title: One Million Dollar Voice
